summary: Returns whether a provided value is a string-like marker made of zero or more dollar signs followed by the exact suffix `__proto__`.
behavior: Returns `false` when the length is less than 9.
Returns `true` when every leading character before `__proto__` is `$`.
Returns `false` for any other suffix or any non-`$` leading character.
edge_cases: An exact length of 9 is valid only for `__proto__`.
Additional trailing characters after `__proto__` make the result `false`.
Truthy non-string values without compatible character access can throw instead of returning `false`.
forbidden_details: Variable names, repository names, source paths, and low-level character-code checks are intentionally omitted.
